creator: junker@jazz.snu.ac.kr
text:
Port upgrade(korean/netscape3).
It is now reconstructed to depend www/netscape3, just add Korean
resources, not including any binary of Netscape.

I am not sure about Netscape's license policy for older versions,
so I set RESTRICTED.

Please delete files/{C,Makefile,ko_KR.euc,nls.alias,nls.dir,mailcap},
scripts directory.
